name: meeting-notes-app
description: Personal meeting notes app — records, transcribes, summarizes
author: Omkar Hanamsagar

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.package: npm run build && electron-builder --mac --dir && codesign --force --deep --sign - 'release/mac-arm64/Meeting Notes.app'
scripts.package:dmg: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg && codesign --force --deep --sign - 'release/mac-arm64/Meeting Notes.app'
